Wishart was found. The PMC article "Recent Advances in NMR-Based Metabolomics" (2018) is also a different paper with different authors. No dedicated page for a 2011 Wishart paper in *Current Opinion in Drug Discovery & Development* with this exact title was found in any search result, and the automated checkers confirmed it is absent from all major academic databases.

EXPLANATION: No paper with this exact title by David S. Wishart in *Current Opinion in Drug Discovery & Development* (2011) was found in any search result or academic database; the closest matches are different papers by different authors or in different venues.
